title: Karol Dayan Soler | Data & AI Developer Portfolio
description: Data-driven developer focused on simulations, computer vision in robotics, and scientific research.
name: Karol D. Soler
skill: Data Analyst | Python Developer | Computer Vision | Robotics | Simulation
about: I am a data-driven developer with experience in scientific simulations, computer vision, and data analysis. I enjoy transforming complex data into clear insights and building models that explain real-world phenomena. My background in research and teaching allows me to communicate technical ideas effectively.

experience.title: Liora Fertility Solutions
experience.subtitle: AI & Computer Vision Engineer
experience.description: Designed AI-based solutions for fertility clinics. Developed computer vision models for oocyte segmentation and built prototypes to improve clinical decision-making.

experience.title: SinfoIA Uniandes
experience.subtitle: Machine Learning & Perception Specialist
experience.description: Built machine learning and computer vision models for robotic perception. Worked with ROS and sensor fusion to improve robot autonomy and environmental understanding.

experience.title: Laboratory for Mechanobiology of Transforming Systems
experience.subtitle: Research Intern
experience.description: Developed computational simulations of cellular movement using Python and MATLAB. Designed stochastic models and contributed to a scientific publication by leading modeling and simulation tasks.

experience.title: Algorithmics Global
experience.subtitle: Programming & Robotics Mentor
experience.description: Taught Python and robotics through project-based learning. Mentored students in building coding projects and strengthened problem-solving and computational thinking skills.

projects.title: NASA Space Apps Challenge – Seismic Detection
projects.subtitle: Global Nominee & National Winner
projects.description: Developed a machine learning and signal processing solution to detect seismic activity on Mars (InSight) and the Moon (Apollo). Optimized noise filtering and signal classification to improve planetary data transmission efficiency.

projects.title: Hand Gesture Recognition with MediaPipe
projects.subtitle: Real-Time Computer Vision System
projects.description: Developed a real-time hand gesture recognition system using MediaPipe and computer vision techniques. Implemented hand landmark detection to track and interpret gestures, enabling intuitive human-computer interaction. The system processes video streams efficiently and can be extended to control robotic or digital interfaces.

projects.title: People Segmentation with U-Net
projects.subtitle: Computer Vision for Robotics
projects.description: Developed a deep learning model based on U-Net architecture for human segmentation in images. Applied to robotics perception tasks to improve environment understanding and object separation.

projects.title: Autonomous Racing Challenge
projects.subtitle: The Construct Robotics Institute
projects.description: Developed an autonomous racing robot in a simulation environment using ROS 2. Implemented computer vision and control strategies (line following and perception) to optimize lap times in a global robotics competition.

projects.title: Fraud Detection System – Global 66
projects.subtitle: Markov Model for Financial Risk
projects.description: Designed a fraud detection system using Markov chains to model transaction behavior and identify anomalies. Improved detection of suspicious patterns in financial data through probabilistic modeling.

training.title: Universidad de los Andes
training.subtitle: B.Sc. in Biomedical Engineering
training.description: Focused on data analysis, computer vision, and scientific simulations, integrating engineering principles with AI applications.

training.title: Pontificia Universidad Javeriana
training.subtitle: Business Intelligence in Computer Engineering
training.description: Specialized in data analysis, databases, and business intelligence tools for data-driven decision making.

training.title: Ministry of Information Technologies and Communications (MinTIC) – Colombia
training.subtitle: Intermediate Artificial Intelligence Certification
training.description: Training in machine learning fundamentals, data analysis, and AI model development.

extras.title: Colivri Robotics Lab – SinfoIA
extras.description: Active member of the Colivri research lab at Universidad de los Andes, working on robotics and AI projects within the SinfoIA team.

extras.title: Scientific Illustration
